projectDescription: A Chrome extension that turns LinkedIn profiles and company pages into actionable intelligence using AI-powered analysis, warm path discovery, and exportable reports.
keyFeatures: AI-powered LinkedIn profile analysis tailored to specific goals (sales, hiring, fundraising, partnerships)
Deep profile scraping with auto-scroll for experience, education, skills, and recommendations
Company page enrichment for up to 2 employers with industry, size, and description context
Recent posts scraping for personalized ice breakers and conversation starters
Mutual connections discovery and cross-referencing with previously analyzed profiles
Warm path discovery via company overlaps, bridges, and introduction chains
Intel Map for company pages — scans employees, ranks them by relevance, and generates an engagement plan
Multi-provider AI support: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google Gemini
Auto-save of all analyses to local storage with a browsable Saved Reports library
Markdown export (individual reports or bulk download of entire library)
